text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the Yasuda Kinen, she wins the Takarazuka
Kinen and makes history.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sweep Tosho's efforts rattle the racing world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bratty Witch Aims for Greatness! Did She Choose the Takarazuka Kinen over the Arima Kinen Purely to Make History?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Triple Tiara Origins Are Irrelevant! "Strength Is Strength!" Will This Declaration Spark New Passion?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: The Takarazuka Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's right... Sweep... You did it...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Which means, I...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What?! They're worried because I'm small? Yeah,
right! I said I'm gonna do this, so I'm gonna do it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
First, I'm winning the Yasuda Kinen and then I'm
winning the Takarazuka Kinen! I'm winning both!
Haven't you been listening?!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Ohhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho makes another bold declaration in
front of a mass of reporters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But attracting this kind of attention is important
when it comes to big races—and mastering grand
racing magic as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm not letting you say anything else about the
Tiara tour or the Triple Crown tour! Just you wait
and see what my magic can do!
...That I cannot ignore.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A lone Umamusume appears in front of an
impassioned Sweep Tosho.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what's going on?! Is that Zenno Rob Roy?! I
thought this was a solo interview with Sweep
Tosho...

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Are you trying to butt in?! I didn't have you
pegged as the butting-in type!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her knees are trembling, and all the color has
drained from her face. It looks like the burden of
her own boldness is crushing her. And yet...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Rob Roy? I couldn't really hear, but you just said
something, didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I-I said I cannot ignore that!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Sweep... I'll go up against you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She stands up and makes her declaration.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I already won the Autumn Shield and, next, I'm
going to win both the Japan Cup and the Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to be the first racer to win the Senior
Autumn Triple Crown since the Centurial
Overlord, and I will be Umamusume of the Year!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Then, as the representative of the Triple Crown
tour...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
And with my hero's sword in hand, I will slay the
witch at the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I've always admired you, Sweep. And now, the
time has come to compe—

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: No. The time has come to defeat you!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: This is my story!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...Aha.
Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Aaahahahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Way to go, Rob Roy. Now I'm really ready to go.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Slay the witch? Hah! You must mean "thrash the
hero"! Because at the very special Takarazuka
Kinen, this very special Triple Tiara
representative...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Is gonna race you, my very, very special opponent, and I'm gonna win! Because my super special magic is gonna be ready!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It's on, Rob Roy. And don't think you'll be getting
any comfort from me the next time you start
sniffling!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Good. I wouldn't have it any other way!
